summary: Personalized Recommendations Feature Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Backend API returns all expected sections (hot_right_now, ending_soon, recommended_for_you, continue_bidding, similar_to_won) with personalized greeting. Frontend component renders correctly with sparkles icon, greeting, and recommendation cards with bid buttons.

issues: text-[8px] used for activity legend and how-it-works section - very small but acceptable for sidebar info

backend_api.personalized_homepage_auth: PASS - Endpoint requires authentication (returns 401 for unauthenticated)
backend_api.personalized_homepage_sections: PASS - Returns all 5 sections: recommended_for_you, continue_bidding, hot_right_now, ending_soon, similar_to_won
backend_api.personalized_homepage_greeting: PASS - Returns personalized greeting with time-based message (Guten Morgen/Hallo/Guten Abend) + username
backend_api.personalized_homepage_preferences: PASS - Returns user_preferences with favorite_categories and is_active_user
backend_api.hot_right_now_structure: PASS - Items have auction_id, product_name, current_price, total_bids, reason

frontend_component.header_with_sparkles: PASS - 'Für dich empfohlen' header with sparkles icon visible
frontend_component.personalized_greeting: PASS - Shows 'Guten Morgen, Admin! ☀️' (time-based greeting with username)
frontend_component.recommendation_sections: PASS - 'Gerade beliebt' (Hot right now) section displayed with 5 items
frontend_component.recommendation_cards: PASS - Cards show product name, price, bid count, and 'Bieten' button
frontend_component.login_prompt: PASS - Shows login prompt for unauthenticated users

text_sizes.auction_cards: PASS - Main auction cards use text-xs and text-sm (legible)
text_sizes.recommendation_cards: PASS - Recommendation cards use text-xs and text-sm (legible)
text_sizes.sidebar_info: INFO - Sidebar uses text-[8px] for activity legend - acceptable for secondary info

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personalized Recommendations feature fully tested and working. Backend API at /api/personalized/homepage returns sections (hot_right_now, ending_soon, recommended_for_you, continue_bidding, similar_to_won) with personalized greeting. Frontend PersonalizedRecommendations component renders on homepage for logged-in users with sparkles icon, greeting, and horizontally scrollable recommendation cards with bid buttons.
